epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: EDF clinical criteria, PASI score for severity

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: EDF guidelines, PASI and DLQI for severity/quality of life assessment
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Topical corticosteroids, vitamin D analogs, phototherapy (NB-UVB) widely available, biologics (TNF inhibitors, IL-17/IL-23 inhibitors) for moderate-severe cases, JAK inhibitors emerging
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High biologic costs, psoriatic arthritis screening gaps, treatment adherence issues
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: EDF guidelines, high phototherapy availability, comprehensive biologic access (TNF/IL-17/IL-23 inhibitors), psoriasis registries
